revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-645

R.F. stage (of a radio transmitter)

1. That part of a radio transmitter in which the radio frequency signals are amplified.

2. This term is usually used to refer to the output stage of a transmitter.

{{IALAFooter}}
